folio.label: 81r
folio.l: This worthy Lymytour , this noble frere
He made alwey , a manä louryngö chere
Vp on this Sompnour , but for honeste
No vyleyns word , to hi~ as ©et spak he
But at the laste , he seide vn to the wyf
Dame q¶ he , god ©eue ©ow rigút good lyf
ñe han here touched , also mot I the
In Scole mater , a greet difficultee
ñe han seid meche thyngö , rigút wel I seye
But Dame , here as we riden , by the weye
Vs nedetú nougút to speken , but of game
And lete auctorites be , a goddes name
To pächynge and to scole , of clergie
And if it like , vn to this compaignye
I wyl ©ow of a Sompnour , txlletelletxelle a game15 the first e in telle seems to have been written on an erasure. Double check the MS.ODR
Parde ©e may wel knowen , by the name
That of a Sompnour , may no good be seide
I preye that´ noon of ©ow , be euele a payde
A Sompnour is a rennere , vp and doun
Witú maundementez , for Fornicaciou~
And is I bete , at euäy tounes ende
¢ Oure host tho spak , a Sire ©e shuld ben hende
And curteys , as a man of ©oure estat
In compaignye , we wyln haue noon debat
